context.description: The article engagement feature (helpfulness voting) is fully implemented in both backend and frontend. However, there are currently no published articles in the database, which blocks end-to-end testing.

current_state.backend: Helpfulness summary API is implemented and working
current_state.frontend: Engagement panel is implemented and integrated
current_state.infra: Backend and frontend servers run successfully
current_state.blocker: No published articles available for testing

objectives.objective: Provide reusable seed script for developers

requirements.requirement: At least one article must be created
Associate votes with different users if applicable
Ensure idempotency (no duplicate data on re-run)
Article detail page loads in browser

acceptance_criteria.criteria: At least one article detail page is accessible
Engagement panel displays real backend data
